name: Llanfoist Wharf to Govilon (Mon+Brec Canal)
highlights: Flat, shaded canal walk on the flank of the Blorenge — perfect all-ability route.
points_of_interest: Llanfoist Wharf (Hill's Tramroad terminus); Govilon Wharf; Dr Who filming location
viewpoints: Blorenge above; Usk Valley below; occasional narrowboats
picnic_spots: Govilon picnic area; benches along towpath
parking_start: Llanfoist Wharf or Govilon Wharf car parks (free)
food_drink_nearby: The Lion Inn Govilon (canal-side); The Bridgend Llanfoist
hazards_notes: Shared with cyclists; slippery when wet
